settings.title: Partnerships & Affiliate Program
settings.subtitle: Grow Your Business With QuickBee
settings.description: Join our growing network of partners and affiliates. Earn competitive commissions, access marketing materials, and grow your business together with QuickBee.

settings.title: Partnership Opportunities
settings.content:
Affiliate Program

  • Who: Bloggers, influencers, content creators, website owners
  • Earn: 5-15% commission on referred sales
  • Tools: Unique links, banners, product feeds
  • Support: Marketing materials, promotional calendars
  • Minimum: No minimum sales requirement

Reseller Program

  • Who: Retailers, shops, business owners
  • Margins: 15-30% wholesale discount
  • Benefits: Dedicated account manager, exclusive pricing
  • Support: Training, marketing support, co-branding
  • Minimum: Quarterly purchase minimums

Technology Partners

  • Who: SaaS companies, developers, API integrators
  • Model: Revenue sharing, white-label options
  • Access: Full API access, sandbox environment
  • Support: Technical documentation, developer support

settings.liquid:
Affiliate Benefits

💰 High Commissions

Earn 5-15% commission on every sale you refer. No cap on earnings.

🎯 Marketing Tools

Custom links, banners, product feeds, and promotional calendars provided.

📊 Dashboard

Real-time tracking of clicks, conversions, and earnings.

🤝 Support

Dedicated affiliate manager to help you succeed.

📱 Monthly Payouts

Get paid monthly with flexible payment options.

🎓 Training

Free training and resources to help you promote effectively.

settings.title: Partner Requirements
settings.content:
Who Can Apply?

  • Individual bloggers and content creators
  • Influencers with engaged audiences
  • Website owners with relevant traffic
  • Social media personalities
  • Small business owners
  • Marketing agencies

Requirements

  • Traffic: Minimum 1,000 monthly visitors (negotiable)
  • Content Quality: Original content that aligns with our brand
  • Agreement: Sign affiliate agreement and terms
  • Compliance: Follow FTC disclosure guidelines
  • Payment Method: Valid bank account for payouts

What We Don't Allow

  • Paid search campaigns on brand keywords
  • Email spamming or unsolicited promotions
  • Misleading or false claims
  • Trademark violations
  • Unethical marketing practices

settings.liquid:
